text: This is Sift — a crossfilter data explorer that handles massive datasets directly in the browser. Apache Arrow for data, WebAssembly for compute, and zero jank.

overlay.title: Sift
overlay.body: Crossfilter exploration for large datasets — Apache Arrow + WASM

text: Every column gets a live summary automatically. Histograms for numbers, frequency bars for categories, and ratio indicators for booleans. All computed in Rust, running as WASM.

overlay.text: Live summaries — histograms, category bars, boolean ratios

text: One hundred thousand rows. Zero jank. Watch the stats bar — the dom only holds visible rows at any time. Everything else renders on demand.

Here's the real trick. Drag a column wider and every single row height recalculates instantly. No dom measurement. Pretext computes text layout with pure arithmetic — two ten-thousandths of a millisecond per cell. That's faster than a single dom reflow.

overlay.title: 0.0002ms per cell
overlay.body: Pure arithmetic text measurement — faster than one DOM reflow

text: Click any column header to sort the entire dataset. Nulls are always sorted last, exactly where you'd expect them.

overlay.text: Click to sort — nulls always last

text: Drag across any histogram to create a range filter. Watch every other column's summary update in real time — that's crossfiltering.

overlay.text: Brush to filter — crossfilter updates everything

text: Click the Yes bar on the Verified column and the entire table filters instantly. Row count drops, every summary updates.

overlay.text: Boolean filter — click Yes or No to drill down

text: Clear all filters and the full dataset snaps back instantly. One hundred thousand rows, ready to explore again.

overlay.text: All 100,000 rows — back in an instant

text: Light and dark themes, built in.
Sift. Open source and ready for your data.

overlay.title: Sift
overlay.body: Apache Arrow • Rust WASM • Pretext Layout • Semiotic Charts
